violations.text: There is insufficient freezer equipment/capacity. PIC stated than many frozen foods have to be stored at another school due to lack of freezer space. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/27/2025

The presence of small ants is not controlled as evidenced by small ants on dry storage shelving. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026

A case of graham crackers was observed stored on the floor in the dry storage room. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. PIC placed box on shelving. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/27/2025
The floors under shelving in the walk-in have an accumulation of soil residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026

There is insufficient freezer space to meet establishment demands. Per PIC, walk-in freezer is non-functional beginning this school year. PIC stated the reach-in freezer was provided but does not have adequate storage capacity. New Violation. Correct By: 10/27/2025

Thermometers are lacking in the share refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 10/13/2025
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 10/27/2025
Labels were not removed from apples prior to washing for service. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2024
The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety licensed with RIDOH. Inspector provided application. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2024
A leak was observed at the faucet of the hand-washing sink. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2024

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2024
No person in charge was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 12/29/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023

Single service items observed stored on the floor in the dry storage room, and on the floor in the kitchen between the walk in freezer & dry storage room. Single service items must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the portable fan have an accumulation of dust. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023
The fan covers in the walk in cooler have an accumulation of dust & debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023
The food prep sink is in poor repair, nonfunctional at time of inspection. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/29/2023
